requirement_topic.en: NIGELEC Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, ARSE Licensing, and Donor-Lender Project Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: NIGELEC BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933、ARSE许可及捐助方-贷款方项目要求
requirement_topic.zht: NIGELEC BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933、ARSE許可及捐助方-貸款方項目要求

summary.en: NIGELEC (Société Nigérienne d'Électricité) is the national electricity utility of Niger, responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale and solar-plus-storage hybrid mini-grid projects — require NIGELEC technical approval for grid connection. ARSE (Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité), established under Ordinance No. 2010-03 and Law No. 2003-004, is the electricity sector regulator and must license electricity generation and storage activities including projects connecting to NIGELEC's network. Niger's grid operates at 220/380 V (single-phase 220 V, three-phase 380 V), 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage and frequency as mainland China, so no PCS voltage re-parameterisation is required in principle, though NIGELEC-specific protection relay settings and interconnection technical conditions must be confirmed. Niger has extremely low grid penetration (electrification rate approximately 19% nationally as of 2023); the majority of BESS deployments are in off-grid or mini-grid configurations supported by solar PV under donor-financed programmes (World Bank, AfDB, EU). For donor-financed projects, the lender's procurement standards — including IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series compliance and IEC 62619 cell safety evidence — typically govern the technical specification alongside NIGELEC/ARSE approval requirements. A publicly accessible NIGELEC technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific requirements must be obtained directly from NIGELEC and ARSE.
summary.zh: NIGELEC（尼日尔国家电力公司）是尼日尔的国家电力公共事业公司，负责发电、输电和配电。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模和太阳能加储能混合微型电网项目——均须取得NIGELEC的并网技术批准。ARSE（电力行业监管机构）依据2010年第03号法令和2003年第004号法律设立，是电力行业监管机关，须对电力发电和储能活动（包括接入NIGELEC电网的项目）颁发许可。尼日尔电网运行参数为220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——与中国大陆标称电压和频率相同，原则上无需对PCS电压重新参数配置，但必须确认NIGELEC专属保护继电器整定值和互联技术条件。尼日尔电网接入率极低（截至2023年全国通电率约为19%）；大多数BESS部署采用离网或微型电网配置，在捐助方资助计划（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟）下配合太阳能光伏运行。对于捐助方资助的项目，贷款方采购标准——包括IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列合规和IEC 62619电芯安全证据——通常与NIGELEC/ARSE批准要求共同制约技术规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认NIGELEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属要求须直接向NIGELEC和ARSE获取。
summary.zht: NIGELEC（尼日國家電力公司）是尼日的國家電力公共事業公司，負責發電、輸電和配電。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模和太陽能加儲能混合微型電網項目——均須取得NIGELEC的併網技術批准。ARSE（電力行業監管機構）依據2010年第03號法令和2003年第004號法律設立，是電力行業監管機關，須對電力發電和儲能活動（包括接入NIGELEC電網的項目）頒發許可。尼日電網運行參數為220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）、50 Hz——與中國大陸標稱電壓和頻率相同，原則上無需對PCS電壓重新參數配置，但必須確認NIGELEC專屬保護繼電器整定值和互聯技術條件。尼日電網接入率極低（截至2023年全國通電率約為19%）；大多數BESS部署採用離網或微型電網配置，在捐助方資助計劃（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟）下配合太陽能光伏運行。對於捐助方資助的項目，貸款方採購標準——包括IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列合規和IEC 62619電芯安全證據——通常與NIGELEC/ARSE批准要求共同制約技術規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認NIGELEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬要求須直接向NIGELEC和ARSE獲取。

standards_or_laws: Ordinance No. 2010-03 — Niger electricity sector law (establishes ARSE regulatory framework)
Law No. 2003-004 — Niger electricity sector framework (base electricity law)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference in donor-financed projects)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
World Bank Group Environmental and Social Framework (ESF) — governs procurement and technical standards for World Bank-financed BESS projects in Niger
Niger grid parameters: 220/380 V, 50 Hz (same nominal as China — no voltage re-parameterisation required in principle)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — the same nominal voltage and frequency as Niger's grid. Unlike Qatar (240/415 V), PCS voltage protection thresholds are nominally compatible for Niger; however, NIGELEC-specific protection relay settings and power quality tolerance limits must still be confirmed and set to NIGELEC/project requirements before commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与尼日尔电网标称电压和频率相同。与卡塔尔（240/415 V）不同，PCS电压保护阈值与尼日尔标称兼容；但NIGELEC专属保护继电器整定值和电能质量容限仍须在调试前确认并按NIGELEC/项目要求进行设置。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與尼日電網標稱電壓和頻率相同。與卡達（240/415 V）不同，PCS電壓保護閾值與尼日標稱兼容；但NIGELEC專屬保護繼電器整定值和電能質量容限仍須在調試前確認並按NIGELEC/項目要求進行設置。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy NIGELEC's grid-connection requirements or ARSE's licensing conditions. While Niger's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's, material gaps remain: (a) ARSE licensing — obtain operating licence from ARSE for the storage activity before grid connection; engage ARSE at the earliest project stage; (b) NIGELEC technical approval — obtain grid-connection technical approval from NIGELEC; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific technical specification exists — engage NIGELEC directly to determine requirements; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor-lender project specifications for World Bank / AfDB / EU-financed projects will typically require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent by donor-lender procurement reviews; (d) extreme environment rating — Niger ambient temperatures regularly exceed 45°C in the Saharan north and peak season across the Sahel; BESS thermal management and cycle-life evidence at elevated temperature must be provided; (e) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA / communication interface protocol required by NIGELEC or the project EPC for BESS monitoring and control (IEC 61850, DNP3, or Modbus project-specific specification); (f) donor ESF compliance — World Bank-financed projects require battery chemistry and end-of-life waste management plans consistent with the World Bank Group Environmental and Social Framework.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足NIGELEC并网要求或ARSE许可条件。虽然尼日尔标称电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国相同，但仍存在实质性差距：（a）ARSE许可——在并网前向ARSE取得储能活动运营许可；应在项目最早阶段与ARSE接触；（b）NIGELEC技术批准——向NIGELEC取得并网技术批准；目前无公开确认的BESS专属技术规格——直接与NIGELEC接触以确定要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——世界银行/非洲开发银行/欧盟资助项目的捐助方-贷款方项目规格通常要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据；中国GB/T标准不被捐助方-贷款方采购审查接受为等效依据；（d）极端环境等级——尼日尔撒哈拉北部及萨赫勒旱季环境温度通常超过45°C；须提供BESS在高温条件下的热管理和循环寿命证据；（e）通信协议——确认NIGELEC或项目EPC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议（IEC 61850、DNP3或Modbus项目专属规格）；（f）捐助方ESF合规——世界银行资助的项目须提供符合世界银行集团环境和社会框架的电池化学体系和报废废物管理计划。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足NIGELEC併網要求或ARSE許可條件。雖然尼日標稱電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國相同，但仍存在實質性差距：（a）ARSE許可——在併網前向ARSE取得儲能活動運營許可；應在項目最早階段與ARSE接觸；（b）NIGELEC技術批准——向NIGELEC取得併網技術批准；目前無公開確認的BESS專屬技術規格——直接與NIGELEC接觸以確定要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——世界銀行/非洲開發銀行/歐盟資助項目的捐助方-貸款方項目規格通常要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據；中國GB/T標準不被捐助方-貸款方採購審查接受為等效依據；（d）極端環境等級——尼日撒哈拉北部及薩赫勒旱季環境溫度通常超過45°C；須提供BESS在高溫條件下的熱管理和循環壽命證據；（e）通訊協議——確認NIGELEC或項目EPC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、DNP3或Modbus項目專屬規格）；（f）捐助方ESF合規——世界銀行資助的項目須提供符合世界銀行集團環境和社會框架的電池化學體系和報廢廢物管理計劃。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARSE operating licence and NIGELEC grid-connection technical approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Niger; IEC 62933 compliance is a practical mandatory requirement in donor-lender project specifications for World Bank / AfDB / EU-financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Niger

source.publisher: ARSE — Autorité de Régulation du Secteur de l'Électricité (Niger Electricity Sector Regulatory Authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy NIGELEC grid-connection requirements or ARSE licensing conditions in Niger. Niger's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's, so no PCS voltage re-parameterisation is required in principle; however, NIGELEC-specific protection relay settings must be confirmed. Obtain ARSE operating licence and NIGELEC technical connection approval before commissioning. For donor-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB, EU), confirm IEC 62933 series compliance evidence and donor ESF environmental requirements with the project owner and lender before equipment procurement is finalised. No publicly accessible NIGELEC technical specification for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement with ARSE and NIGELEC is essential.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足尼日尔NIGELEC并网要求或ARSE许可条件。尼日尔标称电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国相同，原则上无需对PCS电压重新参数配置；但必须确认NIGELEC专属保护继电器整定值。调试前须取得ARSE运营许可和NIGELEC技术并网批准。对于捐助方资助项目（世界银行、非洲开发银行、欧盟），在设备采购最终确定前，应向项目业主和贷款方确认IEC 62933系列合规证据和捐助方ESF环境要求。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认NIGELEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——直接与ARSE和NIGELEC接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足尼日NIGELEC併網要求或ARSE許可條件。尼日標稱電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國相同，原則上無需對PCS電壓重新參數配置；但必須確認NIGELEC專屬保護繼電器整定值。調試前須取得ARSE運營許可和NIGELEC技術併網批准。對於捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、歐盟），在設備採購最終確定前，應向項目業主和貸款方確認IEC 62933系列合規證據和捐助方ESF環境要求。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認NIGELEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——直接與ARSE和NIGELEC接觸至關重要。
